name: Claw Crane Company
short_description: Claw crane store management game. Make machines, arrange the prizes well, and aim for the world's best claw crane store. It's not only manage, you can also play, and must play yourself on the machines!! You can also create original prizes and publish them at the workshop.
detailed_description:
Manage a crane game store in Claw Crane Company.

Establish the proper shape and strength of the claw, the price of the game, and organize the prizes well, to be the most famous game store in the world.
Try to satisfy clients and don't make him angry.

You can use your favorite image as the background of the machine, and also add original prizes although it requires a little more effort.
Furthermore, it is also possible to publish the prizes you create at the workshop.

In the center of the store there is a mysterious crane machine that changes its contents every day.
To unlock new gifts, play and get from that crane.
There are many kinds of prizes such as plush doll, figures, sweets, drinks, etc.
It is also a goal unlock all prizes.
